title: Paytm Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Paytm Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
